home.hero_subtitle: Book unforgettable celebrations — birthdays, proposals, screenings & more
home.kicker: Private theater experiences for occasions that should not feel generic
home.hero_desc: SK Binge Galaxy is the pre-login home for private screenings, birthday rooms, proposal setups, and premium event nights. When someone clicks the SK Binge title, this is the page they should land on.
home.seo_desc: Book an exclusive private theater for birthdays, anniversaries, proposals, and more with SK Binge Galaxy.
home.proof_exclusive: exclusive room access for your slot
home.stage_title: Golden aisle. Custom screen moment. Zero outside crowd.
home.exp_screening_desc: A room that feels reserved for your people, your playlist, your lights, and your moment.
home.exp_setup_desc: Dates, add-ons, timing, and event planning get shaped into one clean booking flow.
home.exp_payment_desc: Checkout and callback handling are built for a controlled, verifiable payment path.
home.exp_photo_desc: The room is designed to feel cinematic before the movie even starts.
home.sig_birthday_desc: Cake table, private seating, your playlist, and a clean reveal moment without crowd noise.
home.sig_proposal_title: A cinematic yes without the chaos
home.sig_proposal_desc: Build a controlled, intimate setting with lighting, timing, and a sharper emotional reveal.
home.sig_corporate_desc: Use the theater like a polished private venue for launches, team events, or premium client sessions.
home.step1_desc: Birthday, proposal, anniversary, surprise date, or a private movie night with friends.
home.step2_desc: Choose your venue, date, show window, guest count, and add-ons in one flow.
home.step3_desc: Get the confirmation, arrive with your booking reference, and let the room do the work.
home.pkg_anniversary_note: Soft lighting, private seating, cleaner atmosphere.
home.pkg_proposal_note: A high-focus room built for one main reveal.
home.pkg_screening_note: Straight private screening without event extras.
home.pkg_corporate_note: Presentations and screenings without banquet noise.
home.pkg_babyshower_note: Comfort-first staging for smaller private groups.
home.guest_couples_quote: It feels more like entering a planned scene than walking into a normal theater show.
home.guest_birthdays_quote: The room already feels like the event before the screen even turns on.
home.guest_teams_quote: Private enough to feel premium, simple enough to book without operational mess.
home.sec_features_kicker: Why this home page should convert better
home.sec_features_title: It sells the feeling before it asks for the login.
home.sec_features_desc: The public landing experience should make the venue feel cinematic, private, and premium before users ever see an auth form.
home.sec_process_title: Plan the night without getting lost in the UI.
home.sec_guest_title: Premium enough for a milestone, simple enough for a fast decision.
home.sec_packages_title: Built for occasions, not just ticket sales.
home.sec_packages_desc: Starting prices below are directional. Final pricing should still reflect slot, setup depth, and add-ons.
home.sec_final_title: Click the SK Binge title anytime and this should still feel like the right front door.
home.sec_final_desc: It now works as a proper public homepage before login, while still handing authenticated users off to booking or admin actions.

common.name: Name
common.offline_msg: Please check your internet connection and try again.

errors.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.ACCOUNT_DISABLED: Your account has been deactivated. Contact support.
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.DUPLICATE_EMAIL: An account with this email already exists.
errors.DUPLICATE_PHONE: This phone number is already registered.
errors.SLOT_UNAVAILABLE: This time slot is no longer available.
errors.PAYMENT_FAILED: Payment could not be processed. Please try again.
errors.CANCELLATION_DENIED: This booking can no longer be cancelled.
errors.BINGE_NOT_SELECTED: Please select a venue to continue.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Unable to connect. Check your internet connection.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
